## 4. CORRECTIONS SDK3 À APPLIQUER

### 4.1 onUninit() pour les boutons

**Fichiers à modifier:**
- `drivers/button_wireless_1/device.js`
- `drivers/button_wireless_2/device.js`
- `drivers/button_wireless_3/device.js`
- `drivers/button_wireless_4/device.js`

**Ajout:**
```javascript
async onUninit() {
  clearTimeout(this._appCommandTimeout);
  clearTimeout(this._rawHandledTimeout);
  this.removeAllListeners();
}
```

### 4.2 IAS Zone enrollment

**Pour contact_sensor:**
```javascript
// Dans onNodeInit()
this.zclNode.endpoints[1].clusters.iasZone.on('attr', async (data) => {
  if (data.attrId === 0x0000) { // ZoneStatus
    await this.setCapabilityValue('alarm_contact', (data.value & 0x0001) !== 0);
  }
});
```

### 4.3 Physical button detection

**Pattern standard:**
```javascript
_markAppCommand() {
  this._appCommandPending = true;
  clearTimeout(this._appCommandTimeout);
  this._appCommandTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
    this._appCommandPending = false;
  }, 2000);
}

// Dans registerCapabilityListener
registerCapabilityListener('onoff', async (value, opts) => {
  this._markAppCommand();
  // ... commande
});

// Dans handler DP
const isPhysical = reportingEvent && !this._appCommandPending;
if (isPhysical) {
  this.homey.flow.getDeviceTriggerCard(flowId).trigger(this, {}, {});
}
```

### 5.1 Scripts à exécuter après corrections

```bash
# 1. Validation syntax
node -e "console.log('Syntax OK')"

# 2. Fix collisions
node scripts/automation/lint-collisions.js

# 3. Audit anti-generic

# 4. Validation Homey
npx homey app validate
```
